coordinate: k2 (official gold tonnes, extended history) + total-reserve denominators

gold_tonnes_primary.source: WGC Central Banks Dashboard API (fsapi.gold.org cbd v11; republishes IMF IFS official gold holdings)
gold_tonnes_primary.coverage: 123 ISO3 holders, quarterly 2000Q4-2026Q1 (102 quarters); year-end (Q4) values used in CSV
gold_tonnes_primary.outcome: API accepted the earlier window directly; NO fallback needed (IMF IFS route not attempted, WGC historical xlsx not needed)

denominators.source: World Bank API, FI.RES.TOTL.CD (total reserves incl. gold, current US$) and FI.RES.XGLD.CD (total reserves minus gold)
denominators.note_k1_china: CHN FI.RES.TOTL.CD 2010-2025 present (2025 = 3748.7 $bn) — feeds the pre-registered k1-China residual as R_C,t

coverage.denominators: six holders 2010-2025 EXCEPT RUS 2025 (World Bank series ends 2024); USA denominators not fetched (out of task scope; US is tonnage stability anchor only)

integrity_anchor_russia.rule: 2014-2020 accumulation ~1,000t -> ~2,300t must be visible in the built series
integrity_anchor_russia.verdict: PASS — end-2013 1035.21t -> end-2020 2298.53t, quoted from rdt_k2_gold.csv

rd2_overlap_reconciliation.method: all overlapping quarters 2019Q1-2025Q4 (28 per country), max |tonnes diff| by country
rd2_overlap_reconciliation.verdict: EXACT match (max |diff| = 0.0 t for all 7 countries; same API, same day, no revisions between the RD2 2019-2025 window and this extended fetch)

observed_source_features: TUR flat at ~116.1t 2010-2016 then rising from 2017 to 614.3t (2025) — as published by the source (WGC/IFS central-bank series); not adjusted
CHN steps 1054.09t (2010-2014) -> 1762.31t (2015): the 2015 disclosure step is in the source data as published
RUS tonnage plateau post-2021: 2332.74t 2022-2024, 2326.52t 2025 (matches RD2 opacity caveat)
not_available: RUS World Bank denominators for 2025 (FI.RES.TOTL.CD / FI.RES.XGLD.CD end at 2024 for RUS; raw JSON retained shows no 2025 value)
USA total-reserve denominators (not fetched — outside the six-holder denominator scope)
not_attempted_because_primary_succeeded: IMF IFS gold-volume API (time-boxed fallback, unused)
WGC historical xlsx (login-gated per RD2 log, unused)
